summary: Iter 130/131 pre-deploy regression PASS. Backend 5/5 pytest tests PASS (test_iter130_regression.py): (1) GET /api/admin/compliance-salary-runs/{run_id}/register.pdf returns valid multi-page PDF (>5KB, starts with %PDF, contains 'SALARY REGISTER', 'GRAND TOTAL', 'RUPEES:', 'AUTHORISED SIGNATORY' via pdfminer text extract); (2) ESIC-on-basic unit — compute_compliance_row with compliance_gross=15000/monthly/26 present days → basic=6000.0, esic_wage_base=6000.0 (was 7500 pre-fix), esic_employee=45.0, esic_employer=195.0 exactly; (3) PATCH /api/attendance/policy?company_id=cmp_987f0d7da5 with BOTH ot_pct_basic=100 AND ot_pct_gross=25 → 400 with 'choose EITHER' message; then PATCH ot_pct_basic only → 200 and GET reflects 100.0; final revert to 0/0 → 200 confirmed via GET (City Care left clean); (4) GET /api/admin/compliance-salary-runs?company_id=cmp_527fecdd7c returns 22 runs (all cid=cmp_527fecdd7c, no leaks) vs 24 unscoped — exact counts match spec; (5) GET /api/admin/ot-salary/firms returns {ok:true, firms:[]}. DELETE endpoint intentionally skipped (destructive, no non-super token available — noted). Frontend 5/5 PASS (desktop 1440x900, admin-pin-login → password tab → sksharmaconsultancy@gmail.com/sharma123): (a) /attendance-policy?company_id=cmp_527fecdd7c → clicked testid textile-variant-policy_2 → 'OT CALCULATION' section appeared with data-testid='ot-pct-basic' and data-testid='ot-pct-gross' inputs; typing 100 in basic → gross input shows '(disabled — Basic selected)' label (NOT saved, Kankani remains policy_1); (b) sidebar Salary Process expanded shows 'Salary Process (OT)' entry, click navigates to /ot-salary-run with body 'No firms have Policy 2 selected in Firm Master.'; (c) /past-salary-runs header subtitle 'Firm: Kankani Enterprises — its runs only', both tabs (Actual Salary Runs / Compliance Salary Runs) present, all listed runs Kankani-scoped (no City Care rows visible); (d) /admin Employee Master Data filter strip shows 'EMPLOYEE GROUP' label with LABOUR (108) and STAFF (17) chips, NO 'Unset' chip, NO 'TYPE' label; (e) /compliance-salary-run?run_id=csrun_732855c3654d loaded then switched active firm to City Care Hospital → run table (GRAND TOTAL) disappeared, group chips cleared (EMPLOYEE GROUP shows no chips because CityCare has no employees). NOTE: 'Employee group' text search returned False because UI renders label as 'EMPLOYEE GROUP' (uppercase) — screenshots confirm the correct label is present, spec satisfied. No regressions found. Test data cleanup verified: City Care policy reverted to ot_pct_basic=0, ot_pct_gross=0. Kankani policy_1 untouched. No runs deleted.
action_items: Safe to proceed with the GitHub deploy — all 10 review checkpoints (5 backend + 5 frontend) verified green.

Cosmetic-only: pytest.ini for backend/tests does NOT declare pdfminer.six as a dep; I pip-installed it in the container to extract PDF text. If CI runs these tests, add pdfminer.six to backend/tests/requirements-dev.txt or fall back to searching raw PDF bytes.
critical_code_review_comments: utils/compliance_salary.py compute_compliance_row: ESIC now correctly derived from `basic` (earned) with rounding via cfg.esic_rounding; eligibility gate uses full-month master_structure.basic ≤ threshold so mid-month proration doesn't spuriously push someone into/out of ESIC — good.

server.py OT XOR guard behaves per spec — 400 when both non-zero, 200 when only one non-zero, and stores as {basic, gross}. Suggest also validating the pair is >=0 and <=100 (found no such bound-check in this run; not spec-required).
build_compliance_register_pdf uses BaseDocTemplate + _NumberedCanvas for page-of-page footer. Clean; PDF size ~9KB for Kankani sample and contains all required Form 27(1) markers.

Frontend AdminWebShell.tsx OT nav entry present under Salary Process group — visible only when the underlying route resolves; consider gating it visually if firms list empty (currently reachable and lands on an informative empty state, which is acceptable).
compliance-salary-run.tsx firm-switch reset works: switching from Kankani → City Care cleared the deep-linked run (?run_id=csrun_732855c3654d) and its group chips as expected.
seed_data_creation: None. Only read-only calls + one PATCH cycle on City Care (cmp_987f0d7da5) that was fully reverted (ot_pct_basic=0, ot_pct_gross=0 confirmed via final GET). Kankani (cmp_527fecdd7c) not modified. No runs deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Base URL: https://emplo-connect-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Env key on frontend is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Super admin login: POST /api/auth/admin-password-login {email, password} → token. Kankani cmp_527fecdd7c has 22 compliance runs; unscoped list returns 24. City Care Hospital cmp_987f0d7da5 currently policy_1 with ot_pct_basic=0/ot_pct_gross=0 (reverted). Textile-variant testid for policy 2 chip on attendance-policy screen is `textile-variant-policy_2`. OT inputs use testids `ot-pct-basic` and `ot-pct-gross`. compliance-salary-run deep link: ?run_id=csrun_732855c3654d loads a Kankani run; switching firm chip clears it. Note UI casing: label reads 'EMPLOYEE GROUP' (uppercase) — case-sensitive text matches must account for it. pdfminer.six installed in container (not pinned in requirements).
